stemHtml:
A Lambert conformal conic chart having standard parallels at 54°S and 59°S is used for navigation. The straight line between A 55° 00′.0S, 165° 00′.0E and B 58° 00′.0S, 154°00′.0E is drawn in this chart.

The True Track angle along the straight line in A is 239°.Calculate the direction T of the straight line in position B.
